title: Us Demand Shock Possibly Recession Too Early To Tell
section_path: Us Demand Shock Possibly Recession Too Early To Tell
section_path_text: Us Demand Shock Possibly Recession Too Early To Tell
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to know this week
1. Financial markets are now worried about a possible demand shock in the US as various economic measures have suddenly turned sharply down. Yields fell sharply, and some "Trump trades" have been underperforming since the inauguration.
